\tzpentry{ID5502}{GM Tidal Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5502 introduces GM Tidal Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Gamma \sim \frac{GM}{R^3}. \label{eq:tidal_curvature} \end{equation}
